languages.text: Демоническая машина застыла в кругу почитающих ее еретехов. Она безмолвна, но от нее так и веет ненавистью.
The daemonic machine sits motionless, surrounded by worshipping heretics. It is silent, but it reeks of hatred.
languages.original_text: Демоническая машина застыла в кругу почитающих ее еретехов. Она безмолвна, но от нее так и веет ненавистью.

traits.locale_text: The demonic machine sits motionless, surrounded by worshipping heretics. It is silent, but it reeks of hatred.
The demonic machine sits motionless, surrounded by worshipping heretics. It is silent, but it reeks of hatred.
The demonic machine sits motionless, surrounded by worshipping heretics. It is silent, but it reeks of hatred.

languages.text: 这台邪恶的机器静静伫立，周围满是对其顶礼膜拜的异端。它沉默无声，却散发出仇恨的恶臭。
languages.original_text: The daemonic machine sits motionless, surrounded by worshipping heretics. It is silent, but it reeks of hatred.

traits.locale_text: 这台邪恶的机器静静伫立，周围满是对其顶礼膜拜的异端。它沉默无声，却散发出仇恨的恶臭。

languages.text: La máquina daemónica permanece inmóvil, rodeada por los herejes que la veneran. Guarda silencio, pero apesta a odio.
languages.original_text: The daemonic machine sits motionless, surrounded by worshipping heretics. It is silent, but it reeks of hatred.

traits.locale_text: La máquina daemónica permanece inmóvil, rodeada por los herejes que la veneran. Guarda silencio, pero apesta a odio.

languages.text: La machine démoniaque se tient immobile, entourée d'adorateurs hérétiques. Malgré son silence, elle empeste la haine.
languages.original_text: The daemonic machine sits motionless, surrounded by worshipping heretics. It is silent, but it reeks of hatred.

traits.locale_text: La machine démoniaque se tient immobile, entourée d'adorateurs hérétiques. Malgré son silence, elle empeste la haine.

languages.text: Şeytani makine, etrafını sarıp ona tapan kâfirlerle birlikte hareketsiz duruyor. Sessiz ama nefret kokuyor.
languages.original_text: The daemonic machine sits motionless, surrounded by worshipping heretics. It is silent, but it reeks of hatred.

traits.locale_text: Şeytani makine, etrafını sarıp ona tapan kâfirlerle birlikte hareketsiz duruyor. Sessiz ama nefret kokuyor.

languages.text: Die von Ketzern umgebene dämonische Maschine steht reglos vor dir. Sie schweigt, riecht aber nach Hass.
languages.original_text: The daemonic machine sits motionless, surrounded by worshipping heretics. It is silent, but it reeks of hatred.

traits.locale_text: Die von Ketzern umgebene dämonische Maschine steht reglos vor dir. Sie schweigt, riecht aber nach Hass.

languages.text: 悪魔の機械は動かず、崇拝する異端者たちで囲まれている。静かだが、憎悪の匂いがする。
languages.original_text: The daemonic machine sits motionless, surrounded by worshipping heretics. It is silent, but it reeks of hatred.

traits.locale_text: 悪魔の機械は動かず、崇拝する異端者たちで囲まれている。静かだが、憎悪の匂いがする。
